title: Home
description: Atelier — a quiet kanban board for Mac. Local-first, no accounts, no noise.

blocks.title: A quiet kanban board.
blocks.subtitle: Three lists. Multiple projects. Everything lives on your device — no accounts, no sync, no noise. Just the work.

items.title: Local-first
items.body: Your data never leaves your Mac. No account required, no cloud dependency. Atelier works offline, always.

items.title: Multiple projects
items.body: Switch between projects instantly from the left rail. Each gets its own icon, colour, and three-column board.

items.title: Drag to move
items.body: Cards drag between columns naturally. Reorder within a list or drop them across — it works the way you expect.

blocks.quote: The best tool for the job is the one that gets out of your way.
blocks.author: Atelier

left.title: Your board, your rules
left.body: Column titles are editable — rename To do, Working on, and Completed to whatever fits how you think. Each project is its own world.

right.title: Feels right on Mac
right.body: Native title bar overlay, system font rendering, light and dark mode that follows your OS preference. Atelier looks like it belongs.

blocks.heading: Download Atelier
blocks.body: Free. No sign-up. Works on macOS 13 and later.
